HOME.WELCOME_TITLE: Welcome to the ARC Raiders Wiki
HOME.WELCOME_DESC: Welcome to the community-driven wiki for ARC Raiders. Earth has been overrun by a ruthless mechanized threat known as ARC. As a Raider, you must leave the underground colony of Speranza, brave the surface to scavenge vital supplies, and extract before the machines—or rival players—take you down. Whether you drop solo or in a squad, knowledge is your best weapon.
HOME.INTEL_1_DESC: New "Vaporizer" ARC variant added to Buried City.
HOME.INTEL_2_DESC: The Harvester's Return – Increased Queen spawns in Dam Battlegrounds this weekend.
HOME.INTEL_3_DESC: Tempest Sniper Rifle ADS speed slightly reduced; Rattler SMG recoil buffed.
HOME.LOOT_DESC: High-yield Weapon Cases spotted in The Blue Gate.
HOME.TIP_DESC: "Smoke grenades disable ARC Snitch drone lasers. Use them to break line of sight."

HOME.CARDS.THREAT.DESC: Learn enemy weaknesses, from basic Drones to Heavy Walkers.

ENEMIES_HUB.TITLE: The ARC Threat
ENEMIES_HUB.SUBTITLE: Browse the bestiary of known ARC machines. Learn their weaknesses, attack patterns, and valuable loot drops to survive your next extraction.
ENEMIES_HUB.NO_ENEMIES: No ARC machines match your selected filters.
WEAPONS_HUB.TITLE: Weapons & Arsenal
WEAPONS_HUB.SUBTITLE: Browse the arsenal available to Raiders. Filter by class, rarity, or ammo type to find the perfect gear for your next extraction.
WEAPONS_HUB.NO_WEAPONS: No weapons match your selected filters.
MAPS_HUB.TITLE: Maps & Regions
MAPS_HUB.SUBTITLE: Explore the various regions of the Rust Belt. Discover extraction points, high-value loot zones, and the unique hazards each map presents.

LOOT_HUB.TITLE: Loot & Materials
LOOT_HUB.SUBTITLE: A comprehensive database of all scavengable items in the Rust Belt. Track crafting materials, high-value trade goods, keys, and rare boss drops.

WORKSHOP_HUB.TITLE: WORKSHOP STATIONS
WORKSHOP_HUB.SUBTITLE: Manage and upgrade your specialized crafting stations in Speranza to unlock advanced weaponry, gear, and supplies.
